description: A deterministic two-generation agent episode with one calculator tool call between LLM generations.

initial_messages.content: You are an agent benchmark participant. Keep outputs brief and do not call tools directly; the runtime executes tools.

generations.name: plan_calculator
generations.prompt: We need the exact value of 12345 * 6789. State in one short sentence that the calculator tool should be used.

generations.name: final_answer
generations.prompt: The calculator tool returned {tool_result}. Give the final answer in one short sentence.
